creator: christandiono@tbp.berkeley.edu
text:
py-django is out of date, so here is an updated Makefile. However this requires http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/146727 to be fixed first.

Fix: Attached. The patch can be modified to update the Makefile to 1.2.1, which should be out on Monday, 24 May 2010.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Install Django. Run dev server. Django reports its version as 1.1.1, which is out of date for 1.1 (1.1.2 is the latest) and 1.2 is already out as well.
